text.title: Solo Self Code Review Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Solo Self Code Review Protocol end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: run-checklist
step.action: Tick or waive each of 10+ items; paste into PR body.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge if items_passed < items_total without waiver explanation.

step.name: ai-second-review
step.action: Submit diff to AI; ask for bugs, edge cases, security, test gaps; paste response.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge if AI review absent.

step.name: check-risk-flags
step.action: Mark RISKY in PR title if any flag hit.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge without cool-off if RISKY.

step.name: cool-off
step.action: Wait >=24h; re-read diff with fresh eyes; record timestamps.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge if cooloff < 24h on RISKY PR.

step.name: ci-and-merge
step.action: Verify CI green; merge; monitor post-merge.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge on yellow/red; revert within 30min on post-merge red.
